2606.10929.title: Recoverable but Not Stationary:Local Linear Structures in Weights and Activations
2606.10929.paper_summary: Task vectors, LoRA, activation steering, and random search around pretrained weights all suggest that learned behaviour can be controlled by linear directions. We ask which linear structures actually exist and on what scale. In a synthetic multitask transformer and LoRA adapters on DistilGPT-2 / GPT-2 we find strong local low-rank task-gradient structure but reject the fixed-task-plane hypothesis: static bases miss the recovery direction, and the useful basis drifts substantially within 100 steps. However, the first recovery updates form a trajectory-prefix basis capturing 77% of the LoRA recovery displacement. We develop random search theory with a Gaussian local-linear theorem that justifies the effectiveness of random parameter search even in very high dimensions. We also study the relation between parameter perturbations and activation steering: a single gradient step produces an activation shift with 0.58 cosine to a labelled-contrast CAA steering vector, with a similar steering effect on Qwen-0.5B BoolQ statements. We validate our results with experiments on synthetic Transformers and LLMs. Our results suggest that linear structures in trained networks are not global task directions, but evolving local geometries that partially persist across parameter and activation spaces.
2606.10929.paper_summary_zh: 任務向量、LoRA、激活引導和在預訓練權重周圍的隨機搜索都表明，學習的行為可以通過線性方向來控制。<lb/>我們詢問實際存在的線性結構是什麼，以及它們的規模。<lb/>在合成的多任務Transformer和 DistilGPT-2 / GPT-2 上的 LoRA 適配器中，我們發現強烈的局部低秩任務梯度結構，但拒絕固定任務平面假設：靜態基底錯過了恢復方向，而有用的基底在 100 步內顯著漂移。<lb/>然而，第一次恢復更新形成了一個捕捉 77% LoRA 恢復位移的軌跡前綴基底。<lb/>我們發展了隨機搜索理論，並提出了一個高斯局部線性定理，這證明了即使在非常高的維度中，隨機參數搜索的有效性。<lb/>我們還研究了參數擾動與激活引導之間的關係：單個梯度步驟產生了一個激活偏移，與標記對比 CAA 引導向量的餘弦相似度為 0.58，對 Qwen-0.5B BoolQ 陳述有類似的引導效果。<lb/>我們通過在合成Transformer和 LLM 上的實驗驗證了我們的結果。<lb/>我們的結果表明，訓練網絡中的線性結構不是全局任務方向，而是部分在參數和激活空間中持續演變的局部幾何。
2606.10929.author: Irina Piontkovskaia et.al.
